title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Stock Photos Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: PayPal and Stripe do not make their exclusion lists public. They do not send you a letter explaining why your country is blocked. You find out when your account gets flagged, your funds get held for 180 days, or your application is rejected with a generic error message. Gumroad has payout delays that stretch to 30 days for sellers in certain regions, and Payhip quietly limits withdrawal options based on geography. These are not edge cases — they are the designed experience for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, and dozens of other countries. The solution is not a workaround. It is a different infrastructure stack entirely: crypto payments through NOWPayments, automated delivery, and a store that no platform can suspend because no platform owns it.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal offers a wide range of services, from online payments to invoicing, but its restrictions on many countries make it unreliable for creators like you. Stripe is a popular payment processor, but its country restrictions and complex setup process can be a barrier. Gumroad is a platform specifically designed for selling digital products, but it has a long list of banned countries. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a complete store infrastructure, including automated delivery, wallet integration, and real-time analytics, without any country restrictions or payment processor requirements.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe both have country restrictions that can block creators from selling their products. Gumroad has a lengthy list of banned countries that can leave creators in limbo. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's infrastructure is designed to work seamlessly with NOWPayments, a payment processor that doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts, and accepts 300+ coins, including popular cryptocurrencies like BTC, ETH, and USDT. This means that creators can sell their stock photos without worrying about country restrictions or payment processor requirements.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe both charge high fees for transactions, often ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction to 3.4% + $0.30 per transaction. Gumroad also charges fees for each transaction, starting at 3.5% + $0.30. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's infrastructure uses NOWPayments, which charges a flat fee of 0.5% + $0.30 per transaction, making it a more cost-effective option for creators. Additionally, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers lifetime access and priority updates, making it a one-time investment that can save creators money in the long run.
PayPal's country restrictions can block creators from selling their digital products.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal and Stripe both require manual processing for each transaction, which can lead to delays and errors. Gumroad also requires manual processing for each transaction, and its delivery capabilities are limited. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers automated delivery, allowing creators to set up their store once and sell their stock photos without worrying about manual processing. Additionally, Unchained Commerce's infrastructure integrates with NOWPayments, which provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easier for creators to track their sales and customer behavior.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a stock photographer in Nigeria or any other country with restricted access to PayPal or Stripe, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the clear choice. With its automated delivery, wallet integration, and real-time analytics, it offers a complete store infrastructure that can help you sell your stock photos without worrying about country restrictions or payment processor requirements. How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
